source: Chandak et al., Scientific Data 2023, DOI: 10.7910/DVN/IXA7BM
notes: All counts computed directly from the downloaded kg.csv (matches Chandak et al.'s published 17,080 diseases / 7,957 drugs). edge_counts_by_relation_partial is INCOMPLETE: the full printout was truncated by the notebook output viewer and the middle entries (including indication/contraindication counts) were never captured here. total_edges and total_nodes are confirmed complete; the relation breakdown is not.
